claim: Imperial Japanese political language encoded the Emperor's divine sovereignty and the national body (kokutai) as sacred, demanding individual self-sacrifice in service of imperial survival as the highest moral obligation overriding personal survival.

confidence.label: moderate-high
confidence.rationale: Both passages advanced to evidence-review. Passage text confirmed against multiple independent online scholarly sources (worldjpn.net, Wikipedia, rikukaigun.org); core wording verified accurately. Tsunoda et al. (1958) p.139 and McLaren (1914) p.197 edition-specific wording requires physical library verification. Confidence raised from 0.70 reflecting confirmed passage integrity.
